reviews.comment:
No hacen descuento ACA ni serviclub en la cafetería el descuento es solo para la mercadería del shop. A los quince días pasé y con sorpresa me encuentro con todo cerrado y apagado. Ingreso y sale un empleado con pocas ganas de atender y me dijo: "..y que quiere es 1de enero. Y estamos viendo de que en estas fechas no abrir..." De ser así dejo mi condición de socio del ACA. Me fui a la YPF que está en la calle Colón.

(Translated by Google)
ACA and Serviclub members don't get discounts at the cafeteria; the discount only applies to shop merchandise. Two weeks later, I went by and was surprised to find everything closed and dark. I went in, and an employee came out, clearly unenthusiastic, and told me, "What do you expect? It's January 1st. And we're considering not opening during this period..." If that's the case, I'll cancel my ACA membership. I went to the YPF gas station on Colón Street.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11465332764445308403/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBd3Z2NXVBRRAB
